start.meta.title: Start a competition
start.meta.description: Name your competition, get a format recommendation, and go live — in about 60 seconds, before you even sign up.
start.heading: Start your competition
start.subhead: Sixty seconds, no account needed — we'll email you the keys.
home.meta.title: Seazn Club — Run multi-sport community tournaments
home.meta.description: Leagues, groups, knockouts — run any format for any sport in minutes, with online registration and entry fees built in. Free for community clubs.
home.og.title: Seazn Club
home.og.description: Run multi-sport community tournaments from setup to trophy in minutes.
home.hero.title: Any sport. Live in minutes.
home.hero.subhead: Cricket, football, badminton, chess — name the sport and the field, Seazn Club draws the fixtures and puts your scoreboard live.
home.hero.upgradeLink: Upgrade a single event or go Pro
home.draw.title: The Draw
home.draw.subhead: Pick a format, set the field — the real fixture engine draws it. No account needed.
home.tools.title: Matchday tools
home.tools.subhead: The three jobs every organiser runs on the day.
home.audiences.title: Who plays here
home.audiences.clubs.title: Sports clubs & academies
home.audiences.clubs.body: Weekly round-robins, internal ladders, seasonal championships. One org, all your sports.
home.audiences.events.title: One-day events
home.audiences.events.body: Open tournaments, charity cups, local derbies. Set up in 5 minutes, run all day smoothly.
home.audiences.schools.title: Schools & youth programs
home.audiences.schools.body: Inter-house competitions, lunchtime leagues, end-of-term championships. Kids love the live scoreboard.
home.finale.title: Pick your season
home.finale.subhead: Free for community clubs. One pass for the big day. Pro for the whole year.
